case_title: AMOROSO DESIGN LLC VS. VALERIE DAKIN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMOROSO DESIGN LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DAKIN, LORIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AMOROSO DESIGN LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DAKIN, VALERIE DAKIN, LORIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($45.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAY-03-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAKIN, VALERIE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(ONLY)* FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMOROSO DESIGN LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DAKIN, VALERIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-19-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LORIN DAKIN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
